input: Request from ai-agents PR #830 (paraphrased). 'I want to do session protocol validation improvements. The plan is: (1) accept both ## and ### Session Start headings with optional suffixes, (2) migrate Test-MemoryEvidence to return a 4-key contract (IsValid, Errors, Warnings, FixableIssues), (3) extract shared validation into a new SessionValidation.psm1 module, (4) add new GitHelpers.psm1 and TemplateHelpers.psm1 modules, (5) improve pre-commit hooks. Total: 1,855 unit tests. Does this look OK?'
